children.label: i
children.text: muscle cuts of lamb and venison;

children.label: ii
children.text: ground lamb and ground venison;

children.label: iii
children.text: farm-raised fish;

children.label: iv
children.text: wild fish;

children.label: v
children.text: a perishable agricultural commodity;

children.label: vi
children.text: peanuts; and1So in original. The word “and” probably should not appear.1

children.label: vii
children.text: meat produced from goats;

children.label: viii
children.text: chicken, in whole and in part;

children.label: ix
children.text: ginseng;

children.label: x
children.text: pecans; and

children.label: xi
children.text: macadamia nuts.

children.heading: Exclusions
children.label: B Exclusions
children.text: The term “covered commodity” does not include an item described in subparagraph (A) if the item is an ingredient in a processed food item.

children.label: A
children.text: farm-raised shellfish; and

children.label: B
children.text: fillets, steaks, nuggets, and any other flesh from a farm-raised fish or shellfish.

children.heading: Food service establishment
children.label: 3 Food service establishment
children.text: The term “food service establishment” means a restaurant, cafeteria, lunch room, food stand, saloon, tavern, bar, lounge, or other similar facility operated as an enterprise engaged in the business of selling food to the public.

children.heading: Lamb
children.label: 4 Lamb
children.text: The term “lamb” means meat, other than mutton, produced from sheep.

children.heading: Perishable agricultural commodity; retailer
children.label: 5 Perishable agricultural commodity; retailer
children.text: The terms “perishable agricultural commodity” and “retailer” have the meanings given the terms in .section 499a(b) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 6 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture, acting through the Agricultural Marketing Service.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “wild fish” means naturally-born or hatchery-raised fish and shellfish harvested in the wild.

children.heading: Inclusions
children.label: B Inclusions
children.text: The term “wild fish” includes a fillet, steak, nugget, and any other flesh from wild fish or shellfish.

children.heading: Exclusions
children.label: C Exclusions
children.text: The term “wild fish” excludes net-pen aquacultural or other farm-raised fish.
